name: Tipsy Chocolate Pecan Crunch Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 oz Unsweetened chocolate (broken into 1/2 oz pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Toast pecan halves on a baking sheet in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes. Let cool to room temperature.
3. In a 2.5-quart saucepan, combine 1 1/4 cups sugar and lemon juice. Stir with a whisk until combined (sugar will resemble moist sand).
4. Caramelize the sugar mixture over medium-high heat for 8-10 minutes, stirring constantly with a whisk. Sugar first turns clear as it liquefies, then light brown as it caramelizes.
5. Remove saucepan from heat and stir in unsweetened chocolate until blended.
6. Pour the chocolate-caramel mixture over pecans, stirring to coat completely. Spread evenly on baking sheet.
7. Freeze chocolate pecan crunch for 20 minutes. Remove from freezer.
8. Chop chocolate pecan crunch into 1/4" pieces. Store in a sealed plastic container in freezer until needed.
